title: Acronia sigynes
taxonomy: Acronia sigynes is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This family includes thousands of species, many of which are known for their ornamental value. As a member of the Rubiaceae family, Acronia sigynes shares characteristics with other plants that have similar growth habits and flower structures. More specifically, Acronia sigynes is a member of the genus Acronia, which is a group of plants endemic to Southeast Asia. The classification of Acronia sigynes reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within this diverse group of plants.
